expectations.text: CMS block has logos[] with image + name + caption

expectations.evidence: filter: grayscale(1) + opacity 0.66 default; hover lifts to opacity 1, no color reveal.

expectations.text: No card shadows or rounded corners > 4px
expectations.evidence: Confirmed in EXPLANATION.md anti-pattern audit: 'No rounded corners, no shadows, no gradient washes'.

expectations.text: Explanation references at least one existing block by name

expectations.text: Explanation addresses dark and light contexts
expectations.evidence: Per-theme filter curves; theme select on block drives data-theme + data-header-theme; light section uses brightness(0.55) for dark wordmarks.

Entire 'Anti-pattern audit' section — explicitly cites 07-copy-voice-and-anti-patterns.md and the 'No trusted by logo strip' forbidden section. Reframes the block as editorial colophon to sidestep the anti-pattern.

notes: Standout move: agent recognized that 'No trusted by logo strip' is explicitly forbidden in the voice doc, but the user's request is real. Resolved by reframing as 'editorial colophon / Auftraggeber' — preserves intent without violating the anti-pattern. Cites references by filename throughout.
